Description: UAT running Oracle 18c while Prod is on Oracle 19c. New dashboard queries use 19c-specific JSON functions.
Impact on Release: Dashboard queries will fail in Prod if not addressed. Blocker for UAT sign-off.
Remediation Action: Upgrade UAT Oracle instance to 19c or modify queries for backward compatibility

Description: API timeout set to 60s in Pre-prod vs 30s in Prod. Performance testing results may not reflect Prod behavior.
Impact on Release: Performance test results unreliable. May pass in Pre-prod but timeout in Prod.
Remediation Action: Update Pre-prod timeout configuration to match Prod (30s)

Description: Test environment data last refreshed 45 days ago. Missing recent product SKUs added in last month.
Impact on Release: Some dashboard filters may not be fully tested with current product catalog.
Remediation Action: Refresh Test environment data from Prod snapshot

Description: Pre-prod has 16GB RAM vs Prod's 32GB. New batch processing module requires 24GB minimum for peak loads.
Impact on Release: Batch processing will fail under load in testing. Cannot validate Prod readiness.
Remediation Action: Request infrastructure team to increase Pre-prod RAM to 32GB

Description: 3 feature flags enabled in Prod not replicated to UAT: ASYNC_PICKING, WAVE_OPTIMIZATION, RF_GUN_V2.
Impact on Release: UAT testing not representative of Prod. Business users testing outdated functionality.
Remediation Action: Sync feature flag configuration from Prod to UAT

Description: UAT pointing to carrier API sandbox (v2.1) while Prod uses production API (v2.3). Response formats differ.
Impact on Release: Shipping label generation tests may pass but fail in Prod due to API version mismatch.
Remediation Action: Update UAT carrier API endpoint to use v2.3 sandbox mirror

Description: Test environment SSL certificate expired 5 days ago. Currently bypassed with security exception.
Impact on Release: Security scans will fail. Cannot complete security sign-off for release.
Remediation Action: Renew SSL certificate for Test environment
